name: space-age-easy-mode
title: Space Age Easy Mode
author: Andre
description: Reduces grind and accelerates progression. Applies global speed/productivity/efficiency bonuses to all productive machines, doubles all module effects, buffs drones with 2× speed and 2× cargo capacity, doubles power generation for steam engine/turbine, plasma/fusion, solar, and lightning rods, and upgrades roboports with larger radius and faster charging.
